name: Loan Announcement
description: Announces a player going out on loan or arriving on loan. Covers both incoming and outgoing loan deals with appropriate messaging.

subheadline.example: Nevistić joins Rijeka on loan for the remainder of the 2025/26 season

guidelines: Include both club crests with a directional arrow showing loan direction. For outgoing loans, use a supportive 'good luck' tone. For incoming loans, use a welcoming tone similar to the signing template but with 'on loan' clearly indicated. Loan duration must be prominently displayed.
